Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are building a POWL model step by step according to the scenario

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Verify Service Request SR This is the starting activity Contract Setup CS must be done after SR and before technical configuration After CS two tasks in parallel Datacenter Allocation DA and Access Control Initialization ACI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Once both DA and ACI are completed we enter a loop Base Network Configuration BNC and then optionally Debug Reconfigure DR The loop is structured as a loop node with two children BNC and DR

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note The loop node in POWL LOOP operator expects two children A and B and the semantics is that we execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again In our case A is BNC and B is DR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the loop we have an exclusive choice XOR between Containerized Deployment CD and Monolithic Deployment MD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we have two tasks in partial order concurrent for QA and SA but note that QA and SA are independent and both must be completed before GLA Finally GLA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that the loop node LOOP operator in POWL does not have an explicit exit The loop node itself is a POWL node and we can have an edge from the loop node to the next node the XOR choice The loop nodes execution semantics it will run BNC and then optionally DR and BNC again until it decides to exit which is built into the loop node So the loop node as a whole is executed and then the next node XOR can start

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will create SR CS DA ACI BNC DR CD MD QA SA GLA as Transition nodes We also need a silent transition for the loop exit Actually the loop operator in POWL does not require an explicit exit transition So we do not need an extra silent transition for the loop exit

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SR to CS order SR to CS CS to DA and CS to ACI so CS must be before both DA and ACI and DA and ACI are independent DA and ACI to loop node so the loop node starts only after both DA and ACI are done Loop node to XOR so after the loop we choose between CD and MD XOR to QA and XOR to SA so QA and SA start after the deployment method is chosen and they are independent QA to GLA and SA to GLA so GLA starts after both QA and SA are done

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to define the loop node as loop OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children BNC and DR The XOR node xor OperatorPOWL operator Operator XOR children CD and MD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we define the partial order root and add the edges accordingly Let us list all nodes in the root partial order SR CS DA ACI loop xor QA SA GLA And the edges order are SR to CS CS to DA CS to ACI DA to loop ACI to loop loop to xor xor to QA xor to SA QA to GLA SA to GLA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note The scenario says that after DA and ACI are both completed the loop starts So we have DA to loop and ACI to loop Also note that the scenario does not require a silent transition for the loop exit because the loop operator in POWL handles the exit internally
